item.title: GENIUS Act rulemaking deadline takes effect, requiring U.S. stablecoin issuers to meet federal reserve, audit, and AML standards.
Circle receives OCC approval to operate as a national trust bank, placing USDC under federal banking supervision.
U.S. and UK regulators release 10-point roadmap to align oversight of tokenized assets and stablecoins across both markets.
SEC plans to issue Regulation Crypto rule in July, offering temporary registration exemptions for token developers and fundraising.
Senate schedules CLARITY Act vote, seeking 60 votes to define SEC and CFTC jurisdictional roles over digital assets.
DTCC launches July pilot of tokenized securities platform with full rollout set for October, backed by major Wall Street firms.
BlackRock's ether ETF captures nearly all U.S. ether ETF inflows for the week as institutional demand returns to the market.
JPMorgan files to launch a tokenized investment fund as Wall Street institutions accelerate on-chain asset issuance.
ESMA MiCA register reaches 294 licensed CASPs, adding Ripple Payments Europe and two state-owned European banks.
France orders ISPs to block Polymarket under National Gambling Authority rules, citing prediction markets as illegal gambling.
Ostium perpetuals exchange loses $18M after attacker exploits oracle infrastructure to submit falsified price data on Arbitrum.
Ethical hackers disclose patched Aptos vulnerability that could have put $70B in on-chain assets at systemic risk.
U.S. Bitcoin strategic reserve implementation continues as federal agencies work through custody and policy logistics.
Kaspersky identifies malware framework targeting crypto investors via trojanized GitHub apps and social engineering tactics.
